request_text: Ensure the new coordination-based tests from write-surface-coherence are selected by a ci-quality gate (kentonium #2067 orphan class). Add gate-selecting markers: test_wp03_bypass_writers_fr008.py -> git_repo (uses git fixture); test_kind_for_artifact.py + test_wp06_meta_reader_sweep.py -> fast (pure logic). Keep the unit marker for taxonomy. Verify via collection against the gate -m exprs; commit + push to feat/write-surface-coherence (updates PR #2106).
